en: This requirement is triggered because you indicated your company has tax or social security responsibility in Germany.
Germany Fiscal Compliance - Tax Clearance Declaration

The Unbedenklichkeitsbescheinigung (official tax clearance certificate) must be obtained from your organization’s local tax office (Finanzamt).

[Official German Federal Tax Portal](https://www.elster.de/eportal/start)

[German Federal Ministry of Finance](https://www.bundesfinanzministerium.de)
Please upload a valid Unbedenklichkeitsbescheinigung from the German Tax Office (Finanzamt) confirming your organization has no outstanding tax liabilities in Germany.
This document must be issued within the last 90 days in order to be accepted.
